title: Dracaena Artificial Tree 120cm Tall Fake Tree Artificial Plants Indoor with White Planter, 4FT Floor Plant Faux Yucca Tree in Pot for Outdoor Home Office Living Room Bedroom Farmhouse
features: 🌲 Lifelike Artificial Plants: TXABL 4FT artificial dracaena tree is designed with trunks, realtic leaves that mimic the vibrant, lush green foliage of a real dracaena plant. The vibrant colors and lifelike texture make this fake plants no matter where is placed in your home, it is perfect

🌲 Easy Maintenance: Artificial trees indoor plants no need for watering and pruning, looks full and fresh every day, making it an ideal solution for those with busy schedules.You only need to wipe the dust off the surface with a damp cloth to make this tall fake plant look new

🌲 Elegent White Planter: Each artificial dracaena plant outdoor tree weighted with concrete for optimal stability, matched a planter. In order to cover up the traces of concrete layer, we matched it with colorful small stones to make it more realistic and beautiful

🌲 Easy Assembly & Shape: All the dracaena branches are outfitted with adjustable sturdy metal wires, they are of strong enough so that you can bend it with confidence. Simply attach branches to trunks and bend metal-wired and fluff the leaves to achieve your desired look. The more precise your adjustments, the fuller and more lifelike the fake dracaena tree becomes

🌲 Suitable for Indoor & Outdoor: Unlike live plants that are prone to limited growth, dropping, and even wilting due to adverse weather, and natural factors, our artificial trees bring everlasting elegance and maintain their vibrant appearance for years. TXABL dracaena silk plant is perfect for living rooms, offices, patios, entrances, big house, office, porch, balcony, doorway, stairway, garden, yard, modern aesthetic decor, etc
